name: arbiter-forge
description: Forge deterministic implementation, documentation, and blind-check orchestration tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Build hard-arbiter tasks with auditable evidence gates.
interface.longDescription: Arbiter Forge turns a normalized objective into a deterministic, self-contained orchestration prompt for implementation, documentation synthesis, or a strict documentation-versus-code blind check.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Arbiter Forge to produce and validate the smallest sufficient hard-arbiter task for my objective.
